criterion_results.text: Australian English used throughout the narrative (colour, optimise, behaviour, organise)
criterion_results.evidence: AUD currency, ABS data sources, AU market references; no American spellings observed (e.g., 'penetrated', 'generalist' are neutral).

criterion_results.text: Estimates show their working — assumptions, ranges, sensitivity
criterion_results.evidence: Assumption Register (A1-A8), Sensitivity Analysis tables on ACV/share and adoption rate, and convergence check between top-down and bottom-up.
Sections 1-9 cover Exec Summary, TAM top-down, TAM bottom-up, SAM, SOM, Assumptions, Sensitivity, Competitive Landscape, Takeaways.

judge_result.notes: The artefact is a comprehensive market sizing report meeting all judge criteria. It demonstrates clear working with both top-down and bottom-up TAM derivations, a quantified SAM funnel, SOM with rationale, an assumption register tagged by confidence and sensitivity, two-way sensitivity tables, and AU-calibrated data (ABS, AUD, ServiceM8/Tradify benchmarks). Narrative is consistent with Australian English conventions.
